# beget_postgresql_role (Resource)

PostgreSQL role (user) within a managed PostgreSQL service. Manages login roles with password and optional parent role inheritance.

## Example Usage
```terraform
data "beget_postgresql_configurations" "cfg" {
  version = "16.4"
  region  = "ru1"
}

resource "beget_postgresql_service" "main" {
  display_name     = "PostgreSQL Terraform"
  description      = "PostgreSQL service for app backend"
  region           = "ru1"
  configuration_id = keys(data.beget_postgresql_configurations.cfg.configurations)[0]
}

resource "beget_postgresql_role" "app" {
  service_id = beget_postgresql_service.main.id
  role_name  = "myapp"
  password   = "Secure_Password_123!"
}
```
```terraform
data "beget_postgresql_configurations" "cfg" {
  version = "16.4"
  region  = "ru1"
}

resource "beget_postgresql_service" "main" {
  display_name     = "PostgreSQL Terraform"
  description      = "PostgreSQL service for app backend"
  region           = "ru1"
  configuration_id = keys(data.beget_postgresql_configurations.cfg.configurations)[0]
}

# Base role with elevated privileges
resource "beget_postgresql_role" "base" {
  service_id = beget_postgresql_service.main.id
  role_name  = "base_role"
  password   = "Base_Password_123!"
}

# Derived role inherits privileges from base_role
resource "beget_postgresql_role" "derived" {
  service_id  = beget_postgresql_service.main.id
  role_name   = "derived_role"
  password    = "Derived_Password_456!"
  parent_role = [beget_postgresql_role.base.role_name]
}
```

> **Note**
> Predefined roles (system roles) cannot be deleted. The `predefined` attribute is read-only.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password for the role.
- `role_name` (String) PostgreSQL role name. Changing this recreates the resource.
- `service_id` (String) PostgreSQL service ID (from beget_postgresql_service). Changing this recreates the resource.

### Optional

- `parent_role` (Set of String) Set of parent role names whose privileges this role inherits.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier (service_id/role_name).
- `predefined` (Boolean) Whether the role is predefined (system role). Predefined roles cannot be deleted.
